_description: Flat wire lookup table for AI querying. Each entry is one wire segment. Query by colour, component, terminal, figure, or circuit.
_query_examples: Find all green wires: filter by colour_main=gn
What connects to E22: filter by from_component=E22 OR to_component=E22
Trace brake circuit: filter by circuit=brake_lights
What fuse protects the horn: filter by circuit=horn, type=fuse

wires.description: Heavy fuse wire to headlight washer relay power input
Light switch headlight terminal enables washer relay coil
Wiper switch washer position triggers headlight washer relay
Headlight washer relay output to pump
Wiper switch to wiper motor park/return
Wiper switch to wiper motor slow speed
Wiper switch to wiper motor fast speed
Wiper switch park return to wiper motor 53e (from Fig 10.35 p159)
Wiper motor earth to ground point 10
Windscreen washer pump earth via T1a to ground 9
Headlight washer pump earth via T2 connector
Foglight relay coil to fog switch
Foglight relay power output to foglight fuse
Foglight relay NO output to fog switch
Fog switch to left foglight bulb
Fog switch to rear foglight warning lamp
Fog switch to rear foglight bulb
Lighting switch terminal 58 enables foglight switch
Brake switch to left brake light
Brake switch to right brake light
Fuse to instrument panel lighting control
Relay adaptor fuse to instrument panel insert lights
Relay adaptor fuse to clock light
Relay adaptor fuse to radio backlight
Relay adaptor fuse to cigarette lighter light
Relay adaptor fuse to heated rear window switch light
Panel light earth to ground point 10
Trailer earth to rear crossmember ground 18
Battery positive to starter main terminal (heavy cable)
Ignition switch start position to starter solenoid
Ignition switch to ignition coil primary
Ignition switch battery terminal to lighting switch
Lighting switch headlight output to dip/flash relay
Lighting switch panel light output to instrument lights
Door contact switch to interior light
Turn signal switch left to front left indicator
Turn signal switch left to rear left indicator
Turn signal switch right to front right indicator
Turn signal switch right to rear right indicator
Blower switch to blower motor (speed control)
Heated rear window relay output to element
Headlight washer pump earth (heavy gauge for current)
E4 dip switch to J relay
Relay power from terminal 56 via J
Light switch enables headlight washer relay
Battery rail 30 → fuse S1 (headlight L dip)
Battery rail 30 → fuse S2 (headlight R dip)
Battery rail 30 → fuse S3 (headlight L main)
Battery rail 30 → fuse S4 (headlight R main)
Blower switch E9 → blower motor V2 (speed 1)
Blower switch E9 → blower motor V2 (speed 2)
Blower switch E9 → blower motor V2 (speed 3)
Blower switch E9 → blower warning lamp K8
Horn button H → horn H1 (earth side switching)
Fuse S10 → heated rear window switch E15
Fuel gauge sender G → fuel gauge G1
Fuse S5 → reversing light switch F4
Reversing light switch F4 → bulb M16
Coolant temp sender G2 → gauge G3
Fuse S8 → emergency relay J2 input
Emergency relay J2 → turn signal switch E2
Ignition coil N → distributor O (HT lead)
Fuse S7 → alternator warning lamp K2
Warning lamp K2 → alternator D+ (lamp off when charging)
Light switch E1(58) → Side light left M1
Light switch E1(58) → Tail light right M2
Light switch E1(58) → Side light right M3
Light switch E1(58) → Tail light left M4

ignition.description: D(15) → N coil → O distributor → P/Q spark

emergency_lights.description: E3 switch → J2 relay → all M5-M8

heated_rear_window.description: E15 switch → J9 relay → Z1 element

interior_light.description: F2 door switch → W interior light

foglight.description: E1(58) enables E23 → J5 relay → L22/L23

foglight_rear.description: E23(83b) → L20 rear fog + K13 warning

trailer_turn_L.description: Parallel to M6 → trailer socket L

trailer_turn_R.description: Parallel to M8 → trailer socket R

_migration.notes: Added standard field contract, quality summary, and engine-specific index without altering existing wire rows.

_quality_summary.null_policy: Unknown/unreadable values remain null; no guessing.

4cyl_CH.note: Wire rows for 13.77 are not yet encoded in this lookup dataset.
